_comment_target: Legacy render path (use_embodiment_adapter=false) on 8x L40 (48 GB each), full 891-clip droid_1k dataset, FSDP. The legacy path is simpler — render_encoder (Conv3d) → render_fuse (Linear) → render_gate (scalar, init=0.1, learnable) → added per-token to temb. No cross-attn, no spatial KV bank, no per-block adapters. Trainable params ≈ render_encoder + render_fuse + render_gate + last 8 unfrozen blocks + tracks_head (~600M). Sharded across 8 GPUs (vs 4-way), so per-rank memory is half what the original 4xA6000 setup needed.
